messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0156",
  "title": "角色扮演",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 角色扮演

崩坏  
星穹铁道

原神

胜利女神新的希望

绝区零

弓箭传说2

放置少女

救世者之树新世界

message.content: This section provides a categorical list of video games classified under the "Role-Playing" (角色扮演) genre. It can answer questions regarding which specific titles are grouped under this RPG category, namely: 崩坏, 星穹铁道, 原神, 胜利女神新的希望, 绝区零, 弓箭传说2, 放置少女, and 救世者之树新世界. The section contains no dates, definitions, procedures, explicit claims, tables, figures, or quantitative metrics. It functions solely as an entity list, serving as categorical evidence for genre-based game classification within the document.
